name: academorix/compliance
purpose: Cross-cutting GDPR / CCPA orchestrator — the canonical home for consent, data-subject rights, retention, legal-hold, subprocessor, and safeguarding evidence.
capabilities: Dsar + DsarArtefact — DSAR state machine + per-module contributions
LegalHold — retention freeze at subject/tenant/case/class scope
RetentionRun audit trail of every retention sweep
DsarExportable / DsarErasable / ConsentRequired / RetentionPolicy / LegalHoldable attributes
when_to_use: A tenant is subject to GDPR, CCPA, COPPA or similar regimes and needs the full compliance-evidence stack.
when_not_to_use: For lightweight retention-only sweeps without DSAR/consent overhead, use academorix/retention alone.
